underlying_goal: Execute Phase 55.2 (Codex Runtime Substrate) end-to-end and address workflow/documentation gaps discovered along the way
friction_detail: Claude pushed a branch without committing untracked CONTEXT.md and modified config.json, trusted stale CLAUDE.md path, used Opus instead of Sonnet for Explore subagents, and initially missed that /gsd-explore exists upstream but wasn't synced to the fork.
brief_summary: User wanted to execute Phase 55.2 and surface workflow gaps; Claude completed the phase, merged the PR, logged 4 signals, captured a deliberation, and updated the roadmap with a new Phase 57.1 and requirement.
